reasoning: 8x zoom reveals multiple tells. (1) AA edges: the boundary between black background and the cream/white body shows intermediate-tone pixels rather than hard pixel-art transitions — classic sub-pixel blending artifact. (2) Noise in solid areas: scattered orange/brown pixels throughout the white body region are inconsistently distributed — some cluster near the outline, others appear mid-field with no structural justification; this pattern is consistent with AI diffusion noise rather than intentional freckle design. (3) Asymmetry: the two pink lower appendages differ noticeably in pixel shape and extent — left is rounder/wider, right is more tapered. (4) Color bleed: orange outline color bleeds into the white body in several locations without a clean 1px border. Positives: face features (blue eyes, pink mouth) are symmetric and semantically coherent; overall silhouette reads correctly as a cloud-poof entity; outline color is consistent orange throughout most of the perimeter. The asset is usable but carries visible AI generation artifacts that may be noticeable at native resolution.
